query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN password IS NOT NULL AND password != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_password, SUM(CASE WHEN password IS NULL OR password = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_password FROM users WHERE isDeleted = 0;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN password IS NOT NULL AND password != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_password, SUM(CASE WHEN password IS NULL OR password = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_password FROM users WHERE isDeleted = 0;
